---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Tributary
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

What is hard, impossible, or inconvenient today?

## Proposed solution

What should change? Describe the ideal behaviour or implementation.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches or workarounds have you thought about?

## Affected area

Tick the parts this feature touches:

- [ ] Contract (smart contract – Rust / Soroban)
- [ ] SDK (TypeScript client – /sdk)
- [ ] App (web dashboard – /app)
- [ ] Indexer (off-chain event processor – /indexer)
- [ ] Docs (/docs)
- [ ] Scripts (/scripts)
- [ ] CI/CD (workflows, repo config – /.github)

## Additional context

Add mockups, reference links, related issues, or anything else that helps.

> Behaviour changes must include tests. Contract code must stay `no_std` with typed errors.
> See [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for full guidelines.
